featured.title: LevelUpOrDieTrying.com
featured.description: Modern lifestyle magazine with data-driven content on health, wealth, and productivity
featured.challenge: Build a high-performance content platform without backend infrastructure while maintaining SEO integrity and mobile-first experience
featured.solution: Developed a modular vanilla JavaScript SPA using ES6 modules with JSON-driven content architecture and waterfall publishing system
learned: Fixed data boundaries prevent SEO disasters
Mobile-first CSS scales better than utility approaches
Vanilla JavaScript can match framework performance

featured.title: Calendar Planner
featured.description: Full-stack calendar with RESTful API, Prisma ORM, and modular ES6 architecture
featured.challenge: Build a complex calendar requiring state synchronization across multiple views with proper timezone handling
featured.solution: Node.js/Express REST API with Prisma ORM and SQLite, ES6 modular frontend with observer pattern for state management
learned: Observer pattern enables real-time UI sync across multiple components without prop drilling
Prisma ORM migrations handle schema changes more reliably than raw SQL
Neumorphic design with dual shadows (inset + outset) creates tactile 3D interfaces
ISO date strings prevent timezone bugs when filtering events across different views

featured.title: PortoQuiz
featured.description: Interactive quiz application testing knowledge about Porto, Portugal with timed questions and leaderboards
featured.challenge: Build a full-stack quiz application demonstrating modern web development practices without frameworks
featured.solution: Vanilla JavaScript SPA with Express backend, SQLite database, OKLCH color system, and keyboard navigation
learned: OKLCH color space with single-hue theming creates more perceptually uniform palettes than HSL
Keyboard shortcut systems (Enter/Escape/Number keys) require careful event delegation to prevent conflicts
Timer-based quiz mechanics need proper cleanup with clearInterval to prevent memory leaks
SQLite leaderboard ranking with SQL ORDER BY and LIMIT taught database query optimization
